summary: All 3 occurrences of CLAUDE.md.template in bot.ts correctly replaced with SKILL.md. Tests updated to match new SKILL.md format. buildClaudeMdContent() and CLAUDE_MD_TEMPLATE_PATH untouched as required.

findings.description: Line 355 comment still says 'Product-aware CLAUDE.md template resolution' — the word 'CLAUDE.md' in the CHANGE comment refers to the output file (CLAUDE.md written to user workspace), not the source template, so it remains accurate.
findings.reason: The comment describes the system purpose (resolving which template becomes the user's CLAUDE.md), not the source file name. Correct as-is.

findings.description: Tests 3 and 7 were updated to remove {{PROJECT_IDEA}}, {USERID}, and Домен assertions. This is correct because SKILL.md files created by tasks 1 and 3 do not contain these template placeholders — they are skill definitions, not workspace templates.
findings.reason: Aligns with actual SKILL.md content from tasks 1 and 3.

findings.description: Validation condition relaxed from '{{PROJECT_IDEA}} && Безопасность' to just 'Безопасность'. Correct for SKILL.md format.
